relicSets.name: Anchored Foundation
relicSets.description: Relics recovered from the most stable rooms. Together they reinforce structural integrity across all systems.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Reduces instability buildup by 15% across all rooms.

relicSets.name: Fractured Signals
relicSets.description: Strange artifacts that pulse with anomalous energy. Collecting them all reveals hidden interference patterns.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Unlocks the Anomaly Resonance strategy, allowing controlled instability bursts for bonus production.

relicSets.name: Forgotten Circuitry
relicSets.description: Old-world components from the earliest rooms. Their combined data reveals lost manufacturing techniques.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Unlocks a hidden upgrade branch in rooms 1-5 that was sealed during initial construction.

relicSets.name: Perfected Components
relicSets.description: Rewards earned only through flawless performance. Each piece represents mastery of a different discipline.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Increases archive depth by 2 tiers, revealing buried lore entries across all rooms.

relicSets.name: Cartographer's Cache
relicSets.description: Mapping tools and environmental samples collected from secret areas across multiple rooms.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Reveals hidden subspaces in rooms 7, 8, and 13 and increases secret discovery chance by 25%.

relicSets.name: Chrono Fragments
relicSets.description: Time-touched relics that shimmer between moments. Their resonance bends the flow of room progression.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Alters event timing behavior, allowing rare events to appear 30% more frequently.

relicSets.name: Convergence Array
relicSets.description: Relics from rooms where multiple systems overlap. Together they enable cross-system synergies.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Unlocks cross-room synergy bonuses when generators from different rooms are active simultaneously.

relicSets.name: Quiet Understanding
relicSets.description: Contemplative relics found only by those who pause, observe, and accept the system as it is.
relicSets.setBonusDescription: Deepens archive entries with philosophical commentary and unlocks the Acceptance ending variant.

multiRoomSecrets.name: The Ghost Signal
multiRoomSecrets.description: A faint transmission echoes across multiple rooms. Tracing it to its source reveals a hidden frequency that predates the facility.

clues.hint: A recurring static pattern in the Signal Tower broadcast logs.
An encrypted data fragment buried in the deepest vault partition.
A neural pathway that fires without any input stimulus.
A timestamp in the Chrono Engine that references a moment before the facility existed.

multiRoomSecrets.rewardDescription: Unlocks the Ghost Frequency ending, where the player discovers the facility was built around an alien signal.

multiRoomSecrets.name: The Original Architect
multiRoomSecrets.description: Scattered blueprints and personal logs suggest someone designed the facility with a hidden purpose. Piecing them together reveals the architect's true intent.

clues.hint: A handwritten note tucked behind a junk pile: 'Start here. Remember why.'
Assembly Line blueprints with annotations in a personal shorthand.
A forging mold shaped like a key that fits no known lock in the facility.
Orbital telemetry data aimed at coordinates that match no known star system.
The Reality Kernel contains a dormant subroutine signed with a personal identifier.

multiRoomSecrets.rewardDescription: Grants the Architect's Key meta-relic, which reveals hidden annotations in every room's codex entries.

multiRoomSecrets.name: Mirror Rooms
multiRoomSecrets.description: Certain rooms contain reflections of other rooms, subtly distorted. Finding all mirror pairs unlocks a parallel traversal route.

clues.hint: Steam patterns in the vents form the outline of the Coolant Labyrinth.
Coolant flow channels mirror the steam vent layout in reverse.
Echoes in the chamber replay sounds from the Harmony Cathedral, inverted.
Harmonic frequencies in the Cathedral resonate with Echo Chamber acoustics.

multiRoomSecrets.rewardDescription: Unlocks the Mirror Traverse route, allowing rooms to be replayed in their mirrored configuration.

multiRoomSecrets.name: The Sleeping Core
multiRoomSecrets.description: Deep beneath the facility lies a dormant processing core. Environmental anomalies in scattered rooms hint at its location and how to awaken it.

clues.hint: Sensor readings spike toward an unregistered subterranean heat source.
Gravity well distortions point downward to a mass far below the facility floor.
Anomaly containment logs reference a sealed entity labeled 'Core-Zero'.

multiRoomSecrets.rewardDescription: Unlocks the Sleeping Core archive chapter, a deep-lore entry explaining the facility's original power source.

multiRoomSecrets.name: The Guide's Origin
multiRoomSecrets.description: The Guide has always been present, but where did it come from? Fragments of its creation story are scattered across the facility.

clues.hint: Wiring Den circuits contain a dormant personality matrix labeled 'Prototype Guide v0.1'.
Data Vault archives contain redacted files about an 'Empathy Engine' project.
The Neural Nexus houses a memory fragment of the Guide's first activation.
Planetary Systems Forge records show the Guide's core was forged from stellar material.
In the Quiet Singularity, the Guide whispers its own creation story if you wait long enough.

multiRoomSecrets.rewardDescription: Grants the Guide's Heart meta-relic, deepening all Guide interactions and unlocking the Guide Origin codex chapter.

archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Increases Guide hint frequency by 10%.
Reveals a hidden clue in the Guide's dialogue across 3 rooms.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Complete the Guide's full memory archive.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Unlocks the Guide's Reflection mode, providing deeper commentary during revisits.
Grants a 5% production bonus when following any documented route.
Unlocks the Route Crossroads narrative introduction.
Adds rare cross-route events to the event pool in all rooms.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Catalogue your first batch of secrets.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Reveals proximity hints for undiscovered secrets in rooms you revisit.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Decode the patterns behind secret placement.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Grants a relic fragment from the Cartographer's Cache set.
Unlocks 'Secret Echo' revisit events in rooms 1-10.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Read the opening chapters of the facility's story.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Grants a 3% codex discovery bonus in all rooms.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Connect the narrative threads across rooms.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Unlocks an alternate transformation stage in rooms 5 and 10.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Complete the full scene lore collection.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Unlocks the Lorekeeper's Epilogue, a narrative wrap-up sequence.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Record your first wave of events.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Increases rare event chance by 5% globally.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Catalogue event chains and their outcomes.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Adds Legacy Event variants to rooms 1-10.
Grants a relic fragment from the Chrono Fragments set.
Grants a 5% bonus to challenge completion rewards.
Reveals hidden challenge modifiers in rooms 11-15.
Unlocks Challenge Remix revisit mode for all rooms.
Transformation stages grant 8% more production.

archiveCompletionRewards.description: Study the transformation mechanics across rooms.
archiveCompletionRewards.rewardDescription: Unlocks an alternate final-stage transformation for rooms 8 and 12.
The Guide comments on transformation history during revisits.
Companion abilities recharge 10% faster.
Reveals hidden evolution triggers for 3 companions.
Adds companion-specific rare events to rooms where companions were first found.

revisitUnlocks.description: Neural Nexus analysis reveals a sealed maintenance hatch in the Junk Corner.
Orbital telemetry data unlocks a buried communication terminal in the Junk Corner.
Data Vault decryption keys open a hidden sub-level beneath the Wiring Den.
Forge Core metallurgy logs hint at a rare alloy hidden in the Wiring Den walls.
Coolant Labyrinth pressure data triggers new Guide commentary in the Steam Vents.
Chrono Engine temporal shifts introduce time-loop events in the Steam Vents.
Neural Nexus frequency analysis reveals a hidden signal pattern in the Signal Tower.
Planetary forge calibration data transforms the Signal Tower's side activity.
Anomaly Containment protocols reveal a quarantined section of the Sensor Lab.
Echo Chamber resonance data activates dormant sensors in the Sensor Lab.
Forge Core schematics reveal a prototype assembly chamber beneath the Assembly Line.
Orbital Control efficiency metrics unlock advanced mastery objectives in the Assembly Line.
Gravity Well pressure maps reveal unexplored branches in the Coolant Labyrinth.
Reality Box paradoxes introduce spatial anomaly events in the Coolant Labyrinth.
Neural Nexus access credentials open a classified archive wing in the Data Vault.
Reality Kernel algorithms reveal a virtual subspace within the Data Vault.
Reality Box spatial data enables gravity manipulation experiments in the Gravity Well.
Chrono Engine logs reference a temporal gravity anomaly hidden in the Gravity Well.
Reality Kernel containment protocols transform the Anomaly Containment side activity.
The Quiet Singularity's calm reveals new Guide reflections on the Anomaly Containment.
Planetary Systems Forge data links reveal a hidden neural conduit in the Neural Nexus.
Singularity insight unlocks transcendent mastery goals in the Neural Nexus.
Planetary forge harmonics reveal a resonant sub-chamber beneath the Forge Core.
Chrono Engine temporal echoes introduce time-forged events in the Forge Core.
Harmony Cathedral frequencies activate hidden acoustic panels in the Echo Chamber.
The Quiet Singularity's silence reveals a final echo hidden in the Echo Chamber.
Reality Kernel philosophy unlocks new Guide meditations in the Harmony Cathedral.
Singularity calm transforms the Harmony Cathedral's side activity into a contemplative mode.
Chrono Engine temporal maps reveal a time-locked door in the Reality Box.
Reality Kernel paradox data introduces reality-fold events in the Reality Box.

microLifeElements.description: A battered repair drone circles lazily above the junk piles, occasionally bumping into debris.
A ceiling fan wobbles unevenly, stirring dust motes in the amber light.
Metallic dust particles drift through shafts of light from cracks in the ceiling.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The central junk heap shifts and settles as upgrades are purchased, revealing buried objects.

microLifeElements.description: Old CRT monitors flicker with scrolling green text and occasional static bursts.
Cable shadows sway on the walls as unseen currents disturb the wiring overhead.
A tangled cable cluster pulses with dim light in a slow breathing rhythm.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The main cable trunk glows brighter as the room transforms, new wires snaking outward.

microLifeElements.description: Heat distortion ripples above active vents, warping the view of distant pipes.
Condensation droplets form on cold pipes and drip into puddles below.
Periodic steam bursts create a fog layer that rolls along the floor.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The main pressure gauge reacts to production levels, its needle swinging with each upgrade.

microLifeElements.description: A faint electromagnetic haze shimmers around the tower's antenna array.
Signal strength meters pulse rhythmically on wall-mounted displays.
The Guide's avatar flickers when signal interference peaks.
Tiny spark-like particles arc between antenna tips during high activity.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The tower's beacon rotates faster as the room evolves, its light reaching farther.

microLifeElements.description: Holographic readouts hover above sensor arrays, displaying real-time data streams.
A calibration drone methodically scans equipment, projecting thin laser grids.
Sensor dishes rotate slowly, tracking invisible signals.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The central sensor array extends additional arms and dishes as the room progresses.

microLifeElements.description: Fine metal shavings drift through the air near active fabrication stations.
Industrial extraction fans hum overhead, creating a steady downdraft.
Robotic arms along the line perform maintenance gestures even when idle.
Moving machine parts cast rhythmic shadows that sweep across the floor.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The assembly line extends with new stations as upgrades are purchased, products becoming more complex.

microLifeElements.description: Cold air creates inverse heat shimmer near super-cooled pipe junctions.
Ice crystals form and float in the air near exposed coolant lines.
Labyrinthine pipe shadows create shifting maze patterns on the walls.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The labyrinth's central cooling tower frosts over progressively, ice patterns becoming intricate.

microLifeElements.description: Rows of server status indicators blink in cascading patterns.
A faint data-visualization haze projects ghostly file structures in the air.
Data tape reels spin intermittently, reading and writing archived information.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The vault door mechanism grows more elaborate with each archive tier unlocked.

microLifeElements.description: Small debris fragments orbit slowly around the central gravity anomaly.
Shadows stretch and compress unnaturally near the gravity distortion field.
Gravitational tides cause periodic waves in any loose material.
The Guide's projection distorts slightly when near the gravity source.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The gravity well's event horizon visually deepens as room mastery increases.

microLifeElements.description: Static discharge falls like rain from containment field generators overhead.
An anomalous haze drifts unpredictably, changing color based on containment status.
The Guide issues subtle warnings when anomaly readings fluctuate.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: Containment pods illuminate sequentially as anomalies are catalogued and secured.

microLifeElements.description: Bioluminescent particles trace neural pathway patterns through the air.
A soft cognitive haze pulses in rhythm with the nexus's processing cycles.
Synaptic bridges form and dissolve between neural columns in real time.
The Guide's responses become more contemplative and layered in this room.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The central neural column grows additional branches, its glow intensifying with each upgrade.

microLifeElements.description: Intense heat distortion rises from the active forge, warping the view above.
Molten sparks drift upward from the forge surface in lazy spirals.
Forge exhaust creates localized thermal updrafts that rustle loose materials.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The forge's crucible glows with increasing intensity, its molten contents changing color with progress.

microLifeElements.description: Sound-reactive shadows pulse on the chamber walls in sync with ambient echoes.
Visible sound waves manifest as shimmering rings that expand outward from the center.
Acoustic panels tilt and adjust, searching for optimal resonance angles.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The echo focus point at the chamber's center produces increasingly complex harmonic visualizations.

microLifeElements.description: Golden motes of light drift downward like gentle snow through the cathedral space.
The Guide's tone becomes reverent and measured within the cathedral walls.
Crystal spires hum with harmonic frequencies, their glow shifting with the room's mood.
Stained-glass-like light patterns slowly rotate across the floor.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The central organ of harmonic crystals gains new pipes and voices with each transformation stage.

microLifeElements.description: Reality static cascades from unstable dimensional seams in the ceiling.
A probability haze makes objects appear to exist in multiple positions simultaneously.
Localized reality storms cause brief visual glitches in the environment.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The reality containment frame warps and shifts, its geometry becoming more impossible with progress.

microLifeElements.description: Orbital trajectory displays show satellite paths and debris fields in real time.
A small maintenance drone tends to life support systems along the habitat walls.
Micro-meteorite dust drifts through the observation windows in zero-g patterns.
The habitat's outer ring rotates slowly, visible through panoramic viewports.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The central command console expands with additional control surfaces as systems come online.

microLifeElements.description: Stellar-grade heat distortion emanates from the planetary forge's core.
Miniature planetesimals orbit the forge in a scale model of planetary formation.
Solar wind simulations create aurora-like effects across the forge chamber ceiling.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The planetary model at the forge's center gains complexity, from dust to fully formed worlds.

microLifeElements.description: Temporal distortion haze causes objects to briefly show their past and future states.
Chronometric particles fall upward near the engine's temporal exhaust ports.
The Guide occasionally repeats phrases or speaks in reverse near temporal hotspots.
Shadows lag behind their objects, creating ghostly time-delayed silhouettes.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The chrono engine's clockwork mechanisms spin at varying speeds, some running backward.

microLifeElements.description: The room's atmosphere is a dense computational fog of rendered possibility.
Code fragments materialize as floating glyphs that dissolve on contact.
The reality kernel itself breathes, expanding and contracting with each processing cycle.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The kernel's crystalline structure reveals deeper fractal layers with each mastery milestone.

microLifeElements.description: Light itself drifts slowly, as if the room exists at the edge of time.
The Guide speaks rarely here, and when it does, its words carry unusual weight.
There are no harsh shadows—only gentle gradients that shift imperceptibly.
A single point of light at the room's center pulses with the rhythm of everything.
The air itself seems to hum at a frequency just below perception.

atmosphereConfigs.landmarkReactivity: The singularity point remains unchanged—but the player's perception of it deepens with each visit.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Measured Path
guideSideObjectives.description: Demonstrate restraint by completing 5 rooms without purchasing the highest-tier upgrade available.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide shares a memory about the value of patience and deliberate choice.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: You could take more, but you choose not to. That tells me something.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: I once watched a system consume everything it could. It didn't end well. You're different.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Inquisitive Mind
guideSideObjectives.description: Discover at least one secret in 10 different rooms.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide reveals a hidden observation about the facility's design philosophy.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: You look where others don't. The facility notices that.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: Every secret you found was placed there by someone who hoped someone like you would come along.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Steady Hand
guideSideObjectives.description: Maintain instability below 10% for 15 consecutive room completions.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide recounts the story of the facility's most stable era and what it meant.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: Steady. Controlled. The systems respond well to your consistency.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: There was a time when everything here ran this smoothly. You've brought that back.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Principled Operator
guideSideObjectives.description: Decline 3 high-value event rewards that would have granted significant power boosts.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide shares its perspective on power and the cost of taking shortcuts.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: Most would have taken that without thinking. You paused. Good.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: Power offered freely always has a cost. You understood that without being told.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Anomaly Investigator
guideSideObjectives.description: Interact with 8 anomalous objects or events across different rooms.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide explains its own theory about why anomalies cluster in certain areas.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: Most avoid the strange things. You walk toward them. Noted.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: The anomalies aren't random. I've been waiting for someone to confirm that. Thank you.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Preservationist
guideSideObjectives.description: Complete 6 rooms without replacing legacy hardware with modern upgrades.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide tells you about the original builders and their philosophy of permanence.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: You keep the old systems running. They appreciate that. In their way.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: Everything new was built on something old. You honor that connection.

guideSideObjectives.title: The Trust Protocol
guideSideObjectives.description: Allow autonomous systems to operate without manual override in 4 rooms.
guideSideObjectives.rewardDescription: The Guide reflects on trust between operators and autonomous systems.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnProgress: Letting go of control is harder than taking it. You're learning.
guideSideObjectives.guideDialogueOnComplete: Trust isn't weakness. It's the foundation of everything we're building here.

cosmeticRewards.name: Glitch Fade
cosmeticRewards.description: Room transitions dissolve through a glitch-art effect with digital artifacts.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all mastery goals in Room 10.

cosmeticRewards.name: Thermal Wipe
cosmeticRewards.description: Room transitions use a heat-distortion wipe effect inspired by the Steam Vents.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Clear Room 3 with zero instability.

cosmeticRewards.name: Philosophical Guide
cosmeticRewards.description: The Guide occasionally quotes philosophical observations during idle moments.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all Guide side objectives.

cosmeticRewards.name: Playful Guide
cosmeticRewards.description: The Guide makes lighthearted comments and jokes during routine operations.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Discover 30 secrets across all rooms.

cosmeticRewards.name: Junk Garden
cosmeticRewards.description: Small plants grow among the junk in Room 1, adding life to the scrap heap.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Revisit Room 1 after completing Room 15.

cosmeticRewards.name: Data Fireflies
cosmeticRewards.description: Luminescent data fragments drift like fireflies through the Data Vault.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete the Secret Archive tier 3.

cosmeticRewards.name: Phoenix Forge
cosmeticRewards.description: The Forge Core's crucible is replaced with a phoenix-shaped flame sculpture.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all mastery goals in Room 12.

cosmeticRewards.name: Crystal Signal Tower
cosmeticRewards.description: The Signal Tower's antenna is replaced with a crystalline growth that refracts light.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete the Ghost Signal multi-room secret.

cosmeticRewards.name: Golden Archive
cosmeticRewards.description: Completed archive entries display in golden illuminated text.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete 6 archive section tiers.

cosmeticRewards.name: Holographic Archive
cosmeticRewards.description: Archive entries project as holographic displays when viewed.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all archive section tier 1 rewards.

cosmeticRewards.name: Aurora Ambience
cosmeticRewards.description: A subtle aurora borealis effect plays in the background of all rooms.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete the Planetary Systems Forge with all secrets found.

cosmeticRewards.name: Deep Starfield
cosmeticRewards.description: Room backgrounds feature a slowly rotating deep-space starfield.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all mastery goals in Room 16.

cosmeticRewards.name: The Architect
cosmeticRewards.description: Display the title 'The Architect' on your profile.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete The Original Architect multi-room secret.

cosmeticRewards.name: Chronomancer
cosmeticRewards.description: Display the title 'Chronomancer' on your profile.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all mastery goals in Room 18.

cosmeticRewards.name: Seal of Stability
cosmeticRewards.description: A golden seal icon displayed on rooms completed with minimal instability.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete the Steady Hand Guide objective.

cosmeticRewards.name: Seal of Anomaly
cosmeticRewards.description: A fractured seal icon displayed on rooms completed via the Anomaly route.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete 10 rooms using the Anomaly route.

cosmeticRewards.name: Singularity Orb
cosmeticRewards.description: A miniature singularity that floats in your trophy display, pulsing with quiet energy.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete Room 20 with all mastery goals.

cosmeticRewards.name: Pioneer Badge
cosmeticRewards.description: A badge awarded for being among the first to complete all rooms.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all 20 rooms at least once.

cosmeticRewards.name: Completionist Badge
cosmeticRewards.description: A badge for achieving 100% completion across all mastery goals.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete all 140 mastery goals.

cosmeticRewards.name: Quiet Dawn
cosmeticRewards.description: An alternate ending visual where the facility powers down peacefully at sunrise.
cosmeticRewards.unlockCondition: Complete the Quiet Singularity with the Acceptance relic set equipped.
